heading: Application for [NAME]
introParagraph1: Complete the questions in each section. Not all questions are mandatory. You can complete the sections in any order.
introParagraph2: Your progress will be saved automatically. You can review your answers before you submit your application.
introParagraph3: Your landlord and any representatives will also see your answers and any documents you upload.

groups.supportForHealthConditions: Support for physical or mental health conditions
